data.title: Atico Mining reports high-grade intercepts at El Roble Mine in Colombia, up to 10.20m of 6.26% Cu, 8.50 g/t Au. Ore body extended with 21 drill holes in 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 28, 2026, Atico Mining Corporation (TSX.V: ATY | OTCID: ATCMF) has announced positive findings from 21 drill holes conducted in 2025 within a historically mined area, contributing to the expansion of tonnage at the El Roble mine. Significant assay results from the drill core holes include 10.20 meters of 6.26% Cu, 8.50 g/t Au and 10.00 meters of 6.77% Cu, 3.39 g/t Au. The intercepts of ore grade have been observed in widths ranging from 0.27 to 10.3 meters in regions with limited drilling, indicating potential opportunities for further extension of the ore body through additional drilling programs.

data.title: Aeva (Nasdaq: AEVA) to attend Oppenheimer 11th Annual Emerging Growth Conference on Feb 3, 2026 (Business Wire).
data.description: A leader in next-generation sensing and perception systems, Aeva® (Nasdaq: AEVA), based in Mountain View, California, shared news that its management will be involved in an upcoming investor event – the Oppenheimer 11th Annual Emerging Growth Conference. This event is set to take place virtually on February 3, 2026. Institutional investors interested in attending can reach out to their Oppenheimer sales representative to secure a spot and schedule a meeting. Aeva Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: AEVA) aims to usher in the next wave of technological advancements.

data.title: Gen Mining appoints Paul McRae and Jeremy Wyeth as Technical Advisors to bolster development of Marathon Project in Ontario.
data.description: TORONTO--Generation Mining Limited (TSX: GENM) has appointed Paul McRae and Jeremy Wyeth as Technical Advisors for the Marathon Copper-Palladium Project in Northwestern Ontario. This move aims to enhance the Company's technical capabilities in advancing the project. The Marathon Project is a significant venture for the Company, located in a promising region for copper and palladium. McRae and Wyeth's expertise will be instrumental in supporting the development, construction, and future operation of this project. Their collective experience will contribute to the Company's efforts in moving forward with this initiative.

data.title: Fisher Investments wins "Training MVP" Award for 8th year in row. Recognized for employee training excellence.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Fisher Investments has been awarded the coveted "Training MVP" Award for the eighth year in a row. The firm's dedication to providing exceptional employee training has been acknowledged, solidifying their reputation as a leader in this area. The award, given for the year 2026, highlights Fisher Investments' ongoing commitment to developing their workforce.

data.title: Palladyne AI gets U.S. Air Force contract to boost swarming capabilities for cross-domain operations.
data.description: A contract from the U.S. Air Force has been granted to Palladyne AI, based in Salt Lake City. The purpose of the contract is to enhance swarming capabilities for Integrated Cross-Domain Operations. The specifics of the contract involve utilizing advanced technology and strategies to improve coordination and efficiency in military operations. This contract marks a significant milestone for Palladyne AI, as they continue to establish themselves as a leader in the field.

data.title: Global agricultural commodity market valued at $1.7 trillion in 2024, set to reach $1.9 trillion by 2030 with 2.2% CAGR growth.
data.description: A recent report titled "Agricultural Commodity Market - Global Strategic Business Report" has been released and is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global Agricultural Commodity market was valued at US$1.7 trillion in 2024 and is expected to reach US$1.9 trillion by 2030, with a projected growth rate of 2.2% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and future forecasts to assist in making well-informed business decisions in the global agriculture sector.

data.title: The Mobility House NA launches Cascade EV Aggregator, a versatile platform for utilities optimizing charging across a variety of EV assets.
data.description: A new vehicle-grid integration platform for utilities, called Cascade EV Aggregator, has been introduced by Mobility House North America in Belmont, California. The technology is touted as the most flexible EV load aggregation tool in North America and enables optimization of charging and discharging for various charger and vehicle asset types. This platform covers a wide range, from home chargers to electric school bus fleets. The system leverages electric vehicle batteries to address the increasing energy demand, with potential for significant impact.

data.title: Hydrostor and Baker Hughes collaborate for sustainable energy storage, 1.4 GW capacity to be integrated.
data.description: In a recent development, Hydrostor, a prominent global long duration energy storage (LDES) developer, and Baker Hughes, a renowned energy technology company, have revealed a strategic agreement. This partnership includes a technology solutions collaboration and an equity arrangement. Baker Hughes will enhance its association with Hydrostor by integrating its technological expertise into Hydrostor’s primary design provision for the advanced compressed air energy storage (A-CAES) solution. This collaboration is significant as it involves a capacity of up to 1.4 gigawatts (GW).

data.title: Stanford research highlights fasting mimicking as new path for Crohn's Disease, promoting nutrition-based solutions - PRNewswireLOS ANGELES, Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: Findings support the growing scientific basis for nutrition-focused methods aimed at altering illness development and promoting remission-focused treatment. The study was conducted in Los Angeles and released on January 28, 2026. L-Nutra is highlighted as the leading nutri-technology firm pioneering evidence-based tactics.

data.title: Traders predict S&P 500 could reach 7600-7800 by Dec 2026 on Kalshi, 19% wager between those levels. Optimism for continued upward trajectory.
data.description: According to traders on Kalshi, a prediction market contract tied to the S&P 500 index suggests that it could reach between 7600 and 7800 by December 31, 2026. Approximately 19% of traders believe the index will close within this range. This projection indicates a positive outlook for the benchmark, which tracks the largest U.S. stocks, and is higher than recent levels. In 2025, the S&P 500 saw an increase of about 16-18%, demonstrating significant growth despite a volatile year influenced by former President Donald Trump.

data.title: Carl's Jr. gives fans free Hangover Burger and $20 promo cards on Feb 9 with Prediction Payback for bad predictions. (Char. count: 102)
data.description: Following the Big Game, on January 28th, 2026, in Franklin, Tennessee, Carl's Jr. is offering a Promotion called Prediction Payback to help individuals recover from hangovers and feelings of regret. This initiative aims to support people dealing with the aftermath of the event. The offer provides a free Carl's Jr. item to alleviate the consequences of the celebration, often associated with hangovers and bruised egos following such occasions. This promotion reflects the brand's recognition of the challenges individuals face post-celebrations, with significant emphasis on supporting their consumers during such times.

data.title: Baltimore receives $2B in arts investment, attracting national talent and cultural innovation.
data.description: New data from a recent analysis by the Greater Baltimore Committee reveals that Baltimore is attracting significant investments, talent, and cultural innovation on a national level. The analysis highlights the city's diverse range of attractions, including major sports and cultural landmarks, as well as makerspaces and creative campuses. This growth is reflected in the impressive numbers seen in Baltimore, with a notable increase in investment and an influx of talent contributing to the city's vibrant cultural scene. The findings showcase Baltimore's emergence as a key player in the national landscape, solidifying its position as a hub for creativity and innovation.

data.title: Granite (NYSE: GVA) to release Q4 & FY 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026, with an investor call at 8:00 a.m. PT. Visit investor.graniteconstruction.com for webcast.
data.description: Granite (NYSE: GVA) is set to announce its financial results for the quarter and fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, on Thursday, February 12, 2026, before the market opens. An investor conference call is scheduled for 8:00 a.m. PT on the same day. Investors are encouraged to tune in to a live audio webcast of the call on the Investor Relations page of Granite's website at investor.graniteconstruction.com. Additional details about the call will be provided.

data.title: Pinterest plans to reduce 15% of its workforce in AI restructuring to focus on AI roles, addressing concerns about tech's impact.
data.description: The company is shifting its focus towards roles centered on artificial intelligence (AI) as a response to growing worries about the technology's effect on the tech workforce.
